title: Oreogrammitis plana
intro: Oreogrammitis plana, also known as the flat rock fern, is a species of fern in the family Polypodiaceae. Traditionally, Oreogrammitis plana is used for its medicinal properties, which include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and alleviating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The bioactive constituents of Oreogrammitis plana include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and saponins, which contribute to its therapeutic effects. In herbal medicine, Oreogrammitis plana is typically prepared as a tea, decoction, or tincture to leverage its health benefits.
taxonomy: Oreogrammitis plana is classified as a species of fern in the family Polypodiaceae. It belongs to the genus Oreogrammitis and is native to the tropical regions of the Pacific Islands. The classification provides insights into the evolutionary relationships and diversity within the Polypodiaceae family.
